---
title: ''
output: html_document
date: ''
---

#```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
#```

## PI

##
<div align="left">
<p>
<img align="left" src="/Users/hubenxia/Documents/algorithm/BioEpi.github.io/picture/BenxiaHu.jpg" width=100 height=100/>
Name: Benxia Hu Ph.D.<br>
Position: Professor<br>
E-mail: hubenxia@gmail.com
</p>
</div>
<br clear="left"/> 

## Postdoc
